boards.description: Interactive puzzle practice: the learner solves by manipulating the scene. One band per station; items are an ordered mission list. Luna narrates each prompt via `say`.

item.name: station
item.note: descriptive owner id; routing is by band

item.name: band
item.note: which station this mission belongs to

item.name: kind
item.note: mechanic id; selects the interactive component

item.name: say
item.note: narration key Luna speaks for the prompt (text must equal `prompt`)

item.name: prompt
item.example: Move one match to turn the 5 into a 3.

item.name: target
item.note: correctness target (matchstick: { goal: digits|equation|largest, accept?: string[] })

content.description: Interactive puzzle missions for the practice board, partitioned by band (one band per station). Ordered: the host plays them in array order. Mechanic `matchstick`: numbers as seven-segment matchstick layouts; scene { start: "6+0=9", moves: 1..2 }; target goals — `digits` (final digits must be in `accept`), `equation` (ANY arithmetically true equation counts), `largest` (must equal the BFS-computed maximum reachable number, so every optimal solution counts and no accept list is authored).
